messages: G'day $p$, I heard you're an adult now!
Still want to travel through the land ?
Ah, you're back! Have you changed your mind ?
Great to ear. Please take this

I don't know how worried I'll feel if 
You don't have the BEST equipement

This one is free, just make sure not to
die out here allright ?
Oh well, I guess you grew out of it

If you change your mind, come tell me so
I can give you something that you will need
prompts:
Of course! I've waited for this moment
 all my life!$m2$
For FREE ???, I guess I'll take it then
